current.headline: Legal advantages hide in the tax code. Most people never find theirs.
current.subhead: Life Loophole shows you the legitimate, IRS-sourced strategies that fit your life — explained in plain English — so you can stop overpaying and start using the system the way it was actually built to be used.

voice_notes: Plain-spoken, confident, demystifying. Translates tax-code complexity.
A little irreverent about how needlessly complicated the system is — on the reader's side.
Specific and sourced. Every claim points to a real rule.
No: 'one weird trick', 'IRS hates this', guaranteed savings, sleaze.

headline_variants.headline: Legal. Sourced. The tax breaks the code actually gives you.
headline_variants.rationale: Constitution-mandated 'lead with legal'. Three beats. Replaces the abstract 'hide in the code' with the concrete 'actually gives you.'

headline_variants.headline: Every loophole is legal. Yours just hasn't found you yet.
headline_variants.rationale: Reclaims the word 'loophole' as the brand owns it (legal, code-sanctioned) and pivots to the reader's strategy.

headline_variants.headline: The tax code is full of legal advantages. We point you at yours.
headline_variants.rationale: Slight rephrase of the current hook that drops the 'most people never find theirs' guilt-trip in favor of action.

subhead_variants.subhead: Life Loophole is a sourced, plain-English finder for every legitimate strategy the IRS code already gives you — filtered to your life, your business, and your year. Educational, not advice.
subhead_variants.rationale: Three filter axes (life/business/year), explicit disclaimer at the end. Constitution-compliant.

subhead_variants.subhead: Pick your situation, get the legal strategies that fit, read the actual code section behind each one. No 'one weird trick,' no guessed savings, no advice — just the rules, explained.
subhead_variants.rationale: Three-step UX, then three explicit anti-positions straight from the CONSTITUTION's 'No' list.

subhead_variants.subhead: Forty-eight sourced strategies, every one tied to a real IRS section. Life Loophole filters them to the kind of life you actually have, in language anyone can read.
subhead_variants.rationale: Leads with the concrete catalog size (matches the hero trust strip), reinforces sourced + plain English.
